items.name: progress-bar
items.title: Progress Bar Stepper
items.description: A single progress bar that fills as the user advances.

items.name: segmented
items.title: Segmented Tabs Stepper
items.description: Segmented control where each step is a selectable tab.

items.name: circular
items.title: Circular Stepper
items.description: An SVG progress ring around the current step number.

items.name: breadcrumb
items.title: Breadcrumb Stepper
items.description: A breadcrumb-style trail of steps with chevrons.

items.name: vertical-stepper
items.title: Vertical Stepper
items.description: A sidebar-style vertical layout: step rail on the left, long-form content on the right, collapsing to a compact nav on mobile.

items.name: user-onboarding
items.title: User Onboarding
items.description: A three-step account onboarding flow with per-step validation.

items.name: org-setup
items.title: Organization Setup
items.description: Workspace, branding, and members setup for a new SaaS tenant.

items.name: team-invites
items.title: Team Invitations
items.description: Collect invites into draft flow data, then review and send them.

items.name: conditional-onboarding
items.title: Conditional Onboarding
items.description: Onboarding whose path is computed from an earlier answer: team accounts visit the invite step, personal accounts skip it.

items.name: product-tour
items.title: Product Tour
items.description: A card-style onboarding walkthrough with dot indicators and free navigation.

items.name: course-player
items.title: Course Player
items.description: A lesson playlist with typed per-lesson metadata and a final quiz.

items.name: validated-checkout
items.title: Validated Checkout
items.description: A checkout where each step has a Zod schema; validate() inside a beforeStepChange guard blocks invalid input before the review step.

items.name: plan-picker
items.title: Plan Picker
items.description: Choose a plan, set billing, then pay — billing path branches on the plan.

items.name: appointment
items.title: Appointment Booking
items.description: Service, professional, time slot, and confirmation.

items.name: two-factor
items.title: Two-Factor Setup
items.description: Pick a method, verify a code, save backup codes.

items.name: kyc-verification
items.title: KYC Verification
items.description: Identity, document, and selfie verification steps.

items.name: device-pairing
items.title: Device Pairing
items.description: Discover, pair, configure, and ready a device over an async transition.

items.name: async-provisioning
items.title: Async Provisioning
items.description: A deploy flow with an async guarded transition, pending UI, a failed first attempt, and a retry path.

items.name: order-tracking
items.title: Order Tracking
items.description: A shipment tracker driven by typed per-step metadata (carrier, location, ETA).

items.name: cicd-pipeline
items.title: CI/CD Pipeline
items.description: Build, test, deploy, verify pipeline status with typed stage metadata.

items.name: approval-flow
items.title: Approval Flow
items.description: A multi-stage submission and approval chain.

items.name: approval-timeline
items.title: Approval Timeline
items.description: A vertical audit timeline where each step carries typed metadata (actor, role, SLA hours) read straight off `step` and `stepper.current` with full inference.

items.name: decision-tree
items.title: Decision Tree
items.description: A plan finder that branches to different follow-up questions and converges on a result computed from the answers.

items.name: save-resume
items.title: Save & Resume
items.description: A controlled wizard whose active step is synced to localStorage and the URL hash.

items.name: ai-workflow
items.title: AI Workflow
items.description: An iterative generation flow where each run is appended to flow data and Refine loops back to the prompt.

items.name: typed-wizard
items.title: Typed Wizard
items.description: An exhaustive stepper.match() over every step id — add or remove a step and the match becomes a compile error until you handle it.

items.name: dashboard-wizard
items.title: Dashboard Wizard
items.description: A SaaS settings wizard with sticky step nav, per-step validation, and an unsaved-changes guard wired through beforeStepChange and beforeunload.

items.name: progress-overview
items.title: Progress Overview
items.description: A progress panel that computes percent complete and an ETA from typed per-step metadata (estimated minutes).
